ogTitle: Devils Creek vs Dewars Pool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devils Creek and Dewars Pool.
heading: Devils Creek vs Dewars Pool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devils Creek, Western Australia and Dewars Pool, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dewars Pool has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Devils Creek (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devils Creek or Dewars Pool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devils Creek has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Dewars Pool scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devils Creek scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Dewars Pool scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devils Creek or Dewars Pool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dewars Pool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
